summary: Complete frontend testing of /reviews page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 11 sections verified. 100% pass rate with all features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews page (/reviews) fully verified. All 11 sections working: (1) Hero with breadcrumb 'Home -> Reviews', eyebrow 'VERIFIED CUSTOMER REVIEWS', H1, 5 stars, review count '5.0 out of 5.0 - 10 Reviews', sources line. (2) Stats bar with orange #FF5722 bg showing 4 stats. (3) Filter tabs - 4 tabs working, 'All Reviews' active by default (orange bg), Google/Thumbtack filters working, Yelp shows empty state. (4) Masonry 2-column grid with 10 reviews, all 10 reviewers present, source badges, border-left on quotes. (5) Read More Reviews section with 3 platform buttons linking to correct external URLs. (6) Trust Section with 3 cards and ghost numbers 01-03. (7) Final CTA with 'JOIN OUR CUSTOMERS' eyebrow, title, 2 buttons (no emojis). (8) UnifiedFooter with SERVICES/COMPANY in orange uppercase with letter-spacing, Licensed & Trusted box with #1A2F45 bg, links in rgba(255,255,255,0.65). (9) Floating BOOK REPAIR button visible after scroll. (10) Mobile sticky bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US buttons. (11) SEO title 'Customer Reviews | FixitBay LLC', meta description mentions verified reviews, LocalBusiness schema with aggregateRating present. NO EMOJIS in any CTA buttons.
tests_passed: Hero section: breadcrumb 'Home -> Reviews', eyebrow 'VERIFIED CUSTOMER REVIEWS', H1 correct, 5 stars visible, '5.0 out of 5.0 - 10 Reviews' count, 'Google - Yelp - Thumbtack' sources
Stats bar: orange #FF5722 background, 4 stats (5.0 Average Rating, 10 Total Reviews, 100% Would Recommend, Since 2023)
Filter tabs: 4 tabs (All Reviews, Google, Thumbtack, Yelp), 'All Reviews' active by default with orange bg
Filter functionality: Google shows 5 reviews, Thumbtack shows 5 reviews, Yelp shows empty state message
Reviews grid: masonry 2-column layout (column-count:2, column-gap:20px), 10 review cards visible
All 10 reviewers present: Gayle Rabbitt, Emily Chen, Michael Kagan, Nicole Lee, Roland Siebelink, Sarah D., Yara T., Liz R., Marina O., Kathleen B.
Review cards have: reviewer name, 5 stars, source badge (Google Review/Thumbtack Review), quote text with border-left (2px solid rgba(255,87,34,0.3))
Read More Reviews section: dark bg #0D1B2A, 3 platform buttons (Google, Yelp, Thumbtack) with correct external URLs
Trust Section: 3 cards (Honest Diagnosis, Same-Day Reliability, 180-Day Warranty) with ghost numbers 01, 02, 03
Final CTA: 'JOIN OUR CUSTOMERS' eyebrow, 'Ready to Experience 5-Star Service?' title, 2 buttons (Schedule Repair Now, Call)
No emojis in CTA buttons (Schedule Repair Now, Call button both clean)
UnifiedFooter: SERVICES/COMPANY columns in orange (#FF5722), uppercase, letter-spacing 1.8px
Footer Licensed & Trusted box with License #51001, #1A2F45 background
Footer links in rgba(255,255,255,0.65) color
Floating 'BOOK REPAIR' button visible after scrolling (>300px), no emojis
Mobile sticky bar: CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US buttons working
SEO title: 'Customer Reviews | FixitBay LLC - Appliance Repair in San Francisco Bay Area'
Meta description mentions verified reviews
Canonical URL: https://fixitbay.net/reviews
LocalBusiness schema with aggregateRating present
notes: The platform buttons (Google Reviews, Yelp Reviews, Thumbtack Reviews) contain Unicode star character (U+2605) which is a text symbol, not an emoji. This follows the 'no emojis' requirement as the star symbol is not from emoji ranges.
